plugins.name: athena
plugins.description: Full-lifecycle workflow orchestrator — 17 skills, 6 parallel agents, smart routing, scale-aware brainstorming, wave-based execution, scientific debugging, four-pass code review, auto-trigger hooks, pipeline state tracking, recovery playbooks, pause/resume, plan versioning, and zero-dependency visual canvas. Multi-platform: Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Gemini CLI, OpenCode.
